Types

DerepFastqOptions = object
  chunkSize*: int
  threads*: int
  parallelMinChunk*: int
  keepReadMap*: bool
  order*: DerepOrder
DerepFastqResult = object
  totalReads*: int64
  uniqueCount*: int
  maxReadLength*: int
  uniques*: seq[DerepUnique]
  readToUnique*: seq[int]
DerepOrder = enum
  dsoAbundance, dsoFirstSeen
DerepUnique = object
  sequence*: string
  abundance*: int64
  meanQual*: seq[float64]
  firstSeenReadIndex*: int64

Procs

proc defaultDerepFastqOptions(): DerepFastqOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc derepFastq(inputPath: string;
                opts: DerepFastqOptions = defaultDerepFastqOptions()): DerepFastqResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: DerepFastqOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
